final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing employee ID badge design for ByteDance (字节跳动), showing both front and back sides, intended for internal company use with photorealistic authenticity.

Style/medium: photorealistic product photography of a modern corporate employee badge, clean and professional corporate identity design
Composition: badge shown in two views — front side displaying employee photo and name, back side showing company logo and access information, arranged side by side or as a reversible flip view
Subject: ByteDance employee ID badge with lanyard hole, standard credit-card size format
Scene/backdrop: subtle neutral gradient or soft studio backdrop that doesn't distract from the badge
Lighting/medium: soft diffused studio lighting with gentle highlights on the plastic surface, avoiding harsh reflections
Color palette: ByteDance brand colors — deep navy blue, white, with subtle red accents; clean corporate palette
Materials/textures: matte laminated plastic card with subtle surface sheen, crisp printed text and photo
Text (verbatim): 字节跳动
Constraints: both front and back sides visible, realistic proportions matching standard ID card dimensions (85.60 × 53.98 mm), professional corporate aesthetic
Avoid: cartoonish or illustrated style, fantasy elements, cluttered backgrounds, exaggerated shadows, 8K/masterpiece stuffer language
